title: Tick Control in Boerum Hill, Brooklyn | $125 – $325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Boerum Hill, Brooklyn. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne illnesses. Licensed experts serving 11217. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Boerum Hill's tree-lined brownstone blocks and proximity to parks like Fort Greene Park make it a charming Brooklyn neighborhood, but these green spaces can harbor ticks that pose serious health risks to residents and their pets. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Boerum Hill, protecting families from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our targeted treatments range from $125 to $325 and are designed to eliminate ticks from your property while keeping your outdoor spaces safe and enjoyable.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in urban tick management with over 15 years of experience serving Brooklyn brownstones, gardens, and courtyards. Our EPA-approved treatments are pet-safe and family-friendly, with same-day service available throughout Boerum Hill's 11217 zip code, and we back all our work with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Boerum Hill's historic brownstones often feature private gardens, courtyards, and proximity to green spaces along Atlantic Avenue and Smith Street, creating ideal habitats for tick populations. The neighborhood's beloved dog-walking culture and access to parks means residents need proactive tick protection to safely enjoy outdoor activities throughout the year.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Boerum Hill?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Boerum Hill typically range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. Most brownstone gardens and small yards fall in the $125-$195 range, while larger properties or severe infestations may require more extensive treatment. We offer free inspections and custom quotes for all Boerum Hill residents.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Brooklyn, and how often should I treat my property?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Brooklyn runs from April through November, with peak activity in late spring and early fall. We recommend professional treatments at the beginning of tick season (April/May) and a follow-up in mid-summer (July) for optimal protection. Properties near Fort Greene Park or with heavy vegetation may benefit from additional treatments during peak months.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets in my Boerum Hill garden?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are completely safe for children and pets once dry, typically within 2-3 hours of application. Our technicians are trained in family-safe application methods perfect for Boerum Hill's brownstone gardens and shared outdoor spaces. We can also schedule treatments when your family is away for added peace of mind.

faqs.question: What areas of my Boerum Hill property need tick treatment?
faqs.answer: We focus on high-risk areas where ticks thrive, including garden perimeters, shaded areas under trees and shrubs, along fences and property lines, backyard seating areas, and any spots where pets spend time. For Boerum Hill properties, we pay special attention to ground-level gardens, ivy-covered areas, and zones bordering neighboring yards or green spaces where ticks commonly travel.
